name: Squisher
summary: class used to wrap Squish functions

constructors.name: Squisher
constructors.summary: constructs a squisher with default parameters

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: Get2dMesh
methods.summary: Get the 2d mesh that results from the squish operation

methods.name: Get3dMesh
methods.summary: Get the 3d mesh that was used for squish operation

methods.name: GetAreaConstrainedTrianglesIndices
methods.summary: Gets mesh vertex indices for the triangular faces that were constrained during the squish. Indices can be used in both the 2d and 3d mesh vertices arrays.

methods.name: GetLengthConstrained2dLines
methods.summary: Gets lines at the position of the mesh edges and diagonals that were constrained during the squish, in the 2d mesh. The line at any index here corresponds to the same line in GetLengthConstrained3dLines.

returns.doc: An array of lines representing the length constraints

methods.name: GetLengthConstrained3dLines
methods.summary: Gets lines at the position of the mesh edges and diagonals that were constrained during the squish, in the 3d mesh. The line at any index here corresponds to the same line in GetLengthConstrained2dLines.

returns.doc: An array of lines representing the length constraints

methods.name: GetMesh2dEdges
methods.summary: Gets lines at the position of the mesh edges and diagonals that were constrained during the squish, in the 2d mesh. The line at any index here corresponds to the same line in GetLengthConstrained3dLines.

returns.doc: An array of lines representing the length constraints

methods.name: GetMesh3dEdges
methods.summary: Gets lines at the position of the mesh edges and diagonals that were constrained during the squish, in the 3d mesh. The line at any index here corresponds to the same line in GetLengthConstrained2dLines.

returns.doc: An array of lines representing the length constraints

methods.name: Is2dPatternSquished
methods.summary: Returns true if the input geometry was the result of a squish operation

methods.name: SquishBack2dMarks
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<GeometryBase> SquishBack2dMarks(GeometryBase squishedGeometry, IEnumerable<GeometryBase> marks)
methods.summary: Maps 2D geometry from the squished surface or mesh back to the original 3D surface or mesh

returns.doc: An enumeratd list of squished marks. Individual marks that fail to squish are null in this list. Returns null on complete failure.

methods.name: SquishCurve
methods.summary: Maps a curve on or near a previously squished 3d surface to the resulting 2d surface

methods.name: SquishMesh(SquishParameters, Mesh)
methods.signature: public Mesh SquishMesh(SquishParameters sp, Mesh mesh3d)
methods.summary: Squish the given mesh into a flat mesh

params.name: sp
params.doc: The parameters for the squish operation

methods.name: SquishMesh(SquishParameters, Mesh, IEnumerable<GeometryBase>, List<GeometryBase>)
methods.signature: public Mesh SquishMesh(SquishParameters sp, Mesh mesh3d, IEnumerable<GeometryBase> marks, List<GeometryBase> squished_marks_out)
methods.summary: Squish the given mesh into a flat mesh

params.name: sp
params.doc: The parameters for the squish operation

params.name: marks
params.doc: Points, Curves, PoiuntClouds, and TextDots to squish. Can be null.

params.name: squished_marks_out
params.doc: The squished marks. If a mark fails to squish, it will have a null entry in the list.

methods.name: SquishPoint
methods.signature: public bool SquishPoint(Point3d point, out Point3d squishedPoint)
methods.summary: Maps a point on or near the previously squished 3d surface to the flattened surface

methods.name: SquishSurface(SquishParameters, Surface)
methods.signature: public Brep SquishSurface(SquishParameters sp, Surface surface)
methods.summary: Squish the surface into a flat brep

params.name: sp
params.doc: The parameters for the squish operation

returns.doc: A brep representing the flattened surface

methods.name: SquishSurface(SquishParameters, Surface, IEnumerable<GeometryBase>, List<GeometryBase>)
methods.signature: public Brep SquishSurface(SquishParameters sp, Surface surface, IEnumerable<GeometryBase> marks, List<GeometryBase> squished_marks_out)
methods.summary: Squish the surface into a flat brep

params.name: sp
params.doc: The parameters for the squish operation

params.name: marks
params.doc: Point, PountCloud, TextDot, and Curve objects to squish. Can be null.

params.name: squished_marks_out
params.doc: A list of the squished marks, with null entries for marks that fail to squish. Can be null.

returns.doc: A brep representing the flattened surface

methods.name: SquishTextDot
methods.summary: Maps a TextDot on or near a previously squished 3d surface to the resulting 2d surface
